title: Bed Bug Treatment in Ardsley, NY | $1,200 – $3,500

intro: Bed bugs in your Ardsley home can turn peaceful nights into sleepless ordeals. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services throughout Ardsley and surrounding Westchester communities, using advanced heat treatments and EPA-approved solutions. Our certified technicians understand the unique challenges of treating both historic homes and modern residences in this charming village.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC combines years of experience serving Westchester County with cutting-edge bed bug elimination technology tailored to Ardsley's diverse housing stock. We offer same-day service, transparent pricing, and a satisfaction guarantee that ensures your home stays bed bug-free.
localContext: Ardsley's beautiful tree-lined streets and mix of Tudor-style homes, garden apartments, and newer developments require customized pest control approaches. From properties near the Saw Mill River Parkway to residences close to Pascone Park and the Ardsley Country Club, we've successfully treated bed bug infestations throughout the village.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Ardsley typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method selected. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Ardsley homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments are completed in one day, though severe infestations may require follow-up visits. Heat treatments typically take 6-8 hours, while chemical treatments may require multiple applications spaced 2-3 weeks apart for complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are your bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only EPA-registered products and proven heat treatment methods that are safe for your family and pets. We provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry, and our technicians are trained in the latest safety protocols to protect your household.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period, we'll re-treat your home at no additional cost. Our goal is complete elimination and your peace of mind.
